textPlain: Fingers crossed for this - it seems like Zed is kinda “going back to the roots” (of working on collaboration) and leaving this in place to disrupt the agentic IDE category (and make themselves not have to spend time on competing in it).Curious to see how adoption among cli agents will go (it’s nice to see Gemini cli already in).The level of competition in the LLM and coding assistant market is always nice to see, and this only helps to make costs of switching between offerings even smaller.
Really hope for this to get traction so I’m not bound to the usual IDE
I’m going to be hungry all day, everyday if this catches on and we call it ACP
